name: Petal 2 Cash Back No Fees Visa Credit Card
perks: 1% cash back immediately, growing to 1.5% after 12 on-time monthly payments
No annual fee, no late fees, no returned payment fees, no foreign transaction fees
Uses cash flow underwriting (analyzes bank account data) so thin/no credit applicants can qualify
Credit limit up to $10,000 based on income and cash flow
Free credit score monitoring via app
Reports to all three major credit bureaus
Petal Offers: 2-10% cash back at select merchants
drawbacks: Must reach 1.5% - starts at 1% which is below competitors
Requires linking bank account for cash flow analysis
Issuer is WebBank, less name recognition than major banks
